title: Add CLI arguments to rkv_sharded_eval.py runner

requirements: Add 2 CLI arguments to ArgumentParser in rkv_sharded_eval.py: --sparse-use-similarity (bool flag), --sparse-similarity-mix-lambda (float)
Pass 2 parameters to speckv_method_config dictionary when method='speckv'
Set defaults matching SparsePruningConfig: sparse_use_similarity=False, sparse_similarity_mix_lambda=0.1
acceptance: 2 CLI arguments added: verify by grep 'sparse-use-similarity\|sparse-similarity-mix-lambda' R-KV/weian_development/rkv_sharded_eval.py | wc -l >= 2
Arguments passed to speckv_method_config: verify by grep 'sparse_use_similarity\|sparse_similarity_mix_lambda' R-KV/weian_development/rkv_sharded_eval.py in speckv config section
Default values preserved: --sparse-use-similarity defaults to False, --sparse-similarity-mix-lambda defaults to 0.1

shared_context.design_pattern: CLI argument forwarding to configuration objects
conventions: Follow existing sparse-* argument naming pattern
Set defaults consistent with config dataclass

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths and smart context
Study existing sparse-* argument patterns in rkv_sharded_eval.py
Find where speckv_method_config is constructed and populated

implementation_approach.title: Add --sparse-use-similarity CLI argument
implementation_approach.description: Add boolean flag argument to enable/disable similarity deduplication
modification_points: Add parser.add_argument('--sparse-use-similarity', action='store_true', default=False, help='Enable Similarity Deduplication in SpecKV') to argument parser
logic_flow: Locate ArgumentParser definition section in rkv_sharded_eval.py
Find existing sparse-* arguments (sparse-normalize-scores, sparse-stats-path, etc.)
Use action='store_true' for boolean flag pattern

implementation_approach.title: Add --sparse-similarity-mix-lambda CLI argument
implementation_approach.description: Add float argument for mix_lambda hyperparameter
modification_points: Add parser.add_argument('--sparse-similarity-mix-lambda', type=float, default=0.1, help='Frequency score weight for similarity scoring (needs search: 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9)') to argument parser
logic_flow: Set default=0.1 matching R-KV default and SparsePruningConfig
Document in help text that this parameter needs hyperparameter search

implementation_approach.title: Forward arguments to speckv_method_config
implementation_approach.description: Pass CLI arguments to speckv configuration dictionary for SparsePruningConfig initialization
logic_flow: Find where other sparse_* parameters are added (sparse_normalize_scores, sparse_stats_path, etc.)
